name: The Veil
description: A gate-less system in the unmapped Reach, accessible only to ships with jump drives. The Veil is named for the Predecessor signal that emanates from a single fixed point in the system — a structure the Predecessors left behind, that is not a ruin in any sense the word fits. The signal is recursive. It is not a transmission. Bardo calls it 'the recursion.' The Compact calls it 'inconclusive.' The Reach calls it 'the thing that listens back.' A small research outpost has been built at the edge of safe approach; the rest of the system is no-man's-land for hulls and minds alike.

predecessor_site.notes: The structure at the signal source. Reachable only by shuttle from the outpost. Long exposure to the signal is dangerous to biological cognition. All visits must be timed.
